title: lithocarpus corneus
intro: Lithocarpus corneus, also known as the roughleaf chinquapin or roughleaf evergreen chinquapin, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Lithocarpus corneus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
